title: Preserve Embedded Media Ratio and Access
summary: Build and verify responsive embedded media in resource training video and map embed repair through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain responsive embedded media from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply responsive embedded media without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the resource training video and map embed repair case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves responsive embedded media when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: resource training video and map embed repair.
steps.why: Preserve Embedded Media Ratio and Access makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in resource training video and map embed repair.

content.text: Video, iframe, canvas, and SVG need explicit responsive contracts. A wrapper or the element can use aspect-ratio while inline and block sizing remain flexible. Titles, captions or transcripts, controls, and fallbacks still matter. A ratio alone does not solve a fixed child width, missing iframe title, inaccessible player, or content that genuinely needs a different composition. Apply it to resource training video and map embed repair.
